description_long: This is a modern swivel chair featuring a curved, semi-enclosed backrest made of black material with a wooden outer shell. The seat is padded and upholstered in black, providing comfort and support. The chair is supported by a central metal column that branches into a five-legged star base, each leg ending in a caster for mobility. The wood grain on the back and sides adds a touch of elegance and warmth, contrasting with the sleek black surfaces. The chair includes integrated armrests formed by the continuous curve of the backrest. A visible lever beneath the seat suggests height adjustment functionality.
description: A stylish swivel chair with a curved black and wood backrest, padded seat, and five-legged caster base. Features integrated armrests and a visible adjustment lever.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open, curved backrest, padded seat, and integrated armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the wood grain shell, the curve of the backrest, and the metal base with casters.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full wooden back shell and the black backrest, with the star-shaped base visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the wood paneling, backrest curve, and the base structure.
attribute_central_support_column: A cylindrical metal column, likely telescoping for height adjustment, connects the seat to the five-legged base.
attribute_seat_back_design: Curved, semi-enclosed backrest with medium height, smooth black inner surface, and a continuous wooden outer shell.
attribute_armrest_style: Integrated armrests formed by the continuous curve of the backrest, made of the same black and wood materials, attached directly to the seat and back.
